# services.trafficserver

<!-- AUTO-GENERATED by scripts/nix-options.sh. Do not edit by hand. -->

All options under `services.trafficserver`.

| Option | Type | Description |
| --- | --- | --- |
| `services.trafficserver.cache` | `strings concatenated with "\n"` | Caching rules that overrule the origin's caching policy. Consult the [upstream documentation](https://docs.trafficserver.apache.org/en/latest/admin-guide/files/cache.config.en.html) for more details. |
| `services.trafficserver.enable` | `boolean` | Whether to enable Apache Traffic Server. |
| `services.trafficserver.hosting` | `strings concatenated with "\n"` | Partition the cache according to origin server or domain Consult the [ upstream documentation](https://docs.trafficserver.apache.org/en/latest/admin-guide/files/hosting.config.en.html) for more details. |
| `services.trafficserver.ipAllow` | `null or YAML 1.1 value` | Control client access to Traffic Server and Traffic Server connections to upstream servers. Consult the [upstream documentation](https://docs.trafficserver.apache.org/en/latest/admin-guide/files/ip_allow.yaml.en.html) for more details. |
| `services.trafficserver.logging` | `null or YAML 1.1 value` | Configure logs. Consult the [upstream documentation](https://docs.trafficserver.apache.org/en/latest/admin-guide/files/logging.yaml.en.html) for more details. |
| `services.trafficserver.parent` | `strings concatenated with "\n"` | Identify the parent proxies used in an cache hierarchy. Consult the [upstream documentation](https://docs.trafficserver.apache.org/en/latest/admin-guide/files/parent.config.en.html) for more details. |
| `services.trafficserver.plugins` | `list of (submodule)` | Controls run-time loadable plugins available to Traffic Server, as well as their configuration. Consult the [upstream documentation](https://docs.trafficserver.apache.org/en/latest/admin-guide/files/plugin.config.en.html) for more details. |
| `services.trafficserver.plugins.*.arg` | `string` | arguments to pass to the plugin |
| `services.trafficserver.plugins.*.path` | `string` | Path to plugin. The path can either be absolute, or relative to the plugin directory. |
| `services.trafficserver.records` | `Traffic Server records value` | List of configurable variables used by Traffic Server. Consult the [ upstream documentation](https://docs.trafficserver.apache.org/en/latest/admin-guide/files/records.config.en.html) for more details. |
| `services.trafficserver.remap` | `strings concatenated with "\n"` | URL remapping rules used by Traffic Server. Consult the [ upstream documentation](https://docs.trafficserver.apache.org/en/latest/admin-guide/files/remap.config.en.html) for more details. |
| `services.trafficserver.sni` | `null or YAML 1.1 value` | Configure aspects of TLS connection handling for both inbound and outbound connections. Consult the [upstream documentation](https://docs.trafficserver.apache.org/en/latest/admin-guide/files/sni.yaml.en.html) for more details. |
| `services.trafficserver.splitDns` | `strings concatenated with "\n"` | Specify the DNS server that Traffic Server should use under specific conditions. Consult the [ upstream documentation](https://docs.trafficserver.apache.org/en/latest/admin-guide/files/splitdns.config.en.html) for more details. |
| `services.trafficserver.sslMulticert` | `strings concatenated with "\n"` | Configure SSL server certificates to terminate the SSL sessions. Consult the [ upstream documentation](https://docs.trafficserver.apache.org/en/latest/admin-guide/files/ssl_multicert.config.en.html) for more details. |
| `services.trafficserver.storage` | `strings concatenated with "\n"` | List all the storage that make up the Traffic Server cache. Consult the [ upstream documentation](https://docs.trafficserver.apache.org/en/latest/admin-guide/files/storage.config.en.html) for more details. |
| `services.trafficserver.strategies` | `null or YAML 1.1 value` | Specify the next hop proxies used in an cache hierarchy and the algorithms used to select the next proxy. Consult the [ upstream documentation](https://docs.trafficserver.apache.org/en/latest/admin-guide/files/strategies.yaml.en.html) for more details. |
| `services.trafficserver.volume` | `null or YAML 1.1 value` | Manage cache space more efficiently and restrict disk usage by creating cache volumes of different sizes. Consult the [ upstream documentation](https://docs.trafficserver.apache.org/en/latest/admin-guide/files/volume.config.en.html) for more details. |
